prelim-data-story

Published

March 31, 2026

Data Story

Load Packages and Data

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(olsrr)
cleaned_screen_time_data = readRDS("./data/cleaned_screen_time_data.rds")
#View(cleaned_screen_time_data)

Visualizations

  1. Age vs Screen Time
cleaned_screen_time_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age, y = screen_time_hours)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    x = "Age",
    y = "Screen Time Hours",
    title = "Screen Time in Relation to Age"
  )
  1. Mental Wellness Index
cleaned_screen_time_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = mental_wellness_index_0_100)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5) +
  labs(
    x = "Mental Wellness Index",
    y = "Count"
  )
  1. Productivity vs Stress
cleaned_screen_time_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = productivity_0_100, y = stress_level_0_10)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    x = "Productivity",
    y = "Stress Level",
    title = "Stress in Relation to Productivity"
  )
  1. Sleep Hours vs Sleep Quality
cleaned_screen_time_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = sleep_hours, y = sleep_quality_1_5)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    x = "Hours of Sleep",
    y = "Quality of Sleep",
    title = "Quality of Sleep in Relation to Hours of Sleep "
  )
  1. Work vs Leisure Screen Time
ggplot(cleaned_screen_time_data, aes(x=work_mode, y=leisure_screen_hours)) + 
  geom_boxplot()
  1. Occupation vs Screen Time
cleaned_screen_time_data |>
  summarise(avg_screen_time = mean(screen_time_hours), .by = occupation) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = avg_screen_time, y = occupation)) +
  geom_col()
  1. Exercise Time vs Mental Wellness
cleaned_screen_time_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = exercise_minutes_per_week, y = mental_wellness_index_0_100)) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE)
`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
  1. Exercise Time vs Stress Level
cleaned_screen_time_data |>
  mutate(stress_category = case_when(
    stress_level_0_10 <= 2 ~ "0-2",
    stress_level_0_10 <= 4 ~ "2-4",
    stress_level_0_10 <= 6 ~ "4-6",
    stress_level_0_10 <= 8 ~ "6-8",
    stress_level_0_10 > 8  ~ "8-10"
  )) |>
  summarise(avg_exercise = mean(exercise_minutes_per_week), .by = stress_category) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = stress_category, y = avg_exercise)) +
  geom_col()

Visualizations Using Models

  1. Predicting Screen Time Hours

Correlation Matrix

st_data_without_categories = cleaned_screen_time_data[,c(2, 6, 9:15)]
st_data_without_categories |> 
  cor() |> 
  ggcorrplot()
Warning: `aes_string()` was deprecated in ggplot2 3.0.0.
ℹ Please use tidy evaluation idioms with `aes()`.
ℹ See also `vignette("ggplot2-in-packages")` for more information.
ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggcorrplot package.
  Please report the issue at <https://github.com/kassambara/ggcorrplot/issues>.

Stepwise Regression

st_data_without_st_overlap = cleaned_screen_time_data[,c(2:6, 9:15)]
model_full = lm(screen_time_hours~., data = st_data_without_st_overlap)

# Optionally add data = T to view process
ols_step_both_p(model_full) 

                                        Stepwise Summary                                        
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Step    Variable                           AIC         SBC        SBIC        R2       Adj. R2 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 0      Base Model                       1868.316    1876.299    731.119    0.00000    0.00000 
 1      productivity_0_100 (+)           1593.700    1605.675    457.387    0.49920    0.49794 
 2      sleep_quality_1_5 (+)            1550.284    1566.250    414.067    0.55295    0.55070 
 3      stress_level_0_10 (+)            1530.098    1550.056    393.952    0.57707    0.57386 
 4      work_mode (+)                    1513.545    1541.486    375.639    0.59825    0.59315 
 5      social_hours_per_week (+)        1507.090    1539.022    369.278    0.60665    0.60065 
 6      occupation (+)                   1483.579    1531.476    340.747    0.63645    0.62711 
 7      exercise_minutes_per_week (+)    1481.553    1533.442    338.931    0.64009    0.62989 
 8      sleep_hours (+)                  1480.633    1536.514    338.213    0.64271    0.63163 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Final Model Output 
------------------

                         Model Summary                           
----------------------------------------------------------------
R                       0.802       RMSE                  1.487 
R-Squared               0.643       MSE                   2.212 
Adj. R-Squared          0.632       Coef. Var            16.753 
Pred R-Squared          0.620       AIC                1480.633 
MAE                     1.176       SBC                1536.514 
----------------------------------------------------------------
 RMSE: Root Mean Square Error 
 MSE: Mean Square Error 
 MAE: Mean Absolute Error 
 AIC: Akaike Information Criteria 
 SBC: Schwarz Bayesian Criteria

               Squares         DF    Mean Square      F         Sig.

Total         2475.943        399

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
              (Intercept)    11.186         1.411                  7.929    0.000     8.412    13.960 
       productivity_0_100    -0.087         0.012       -0.522    -7.352    0.000    -0.110    -0.063 
        sleep_quality_1_5     1.060         0.171        0.277     6.198    0.000     0.724     1.396 
        stress_level_0_10     0.321         0.078        0.270     4.135    0.000     0.168     0.473 
          work_modeHybrid    -0.545         0.186       -0.106    -2.937    0.004    -0.910    -0.180 
       work_modeIn-person    -0.899         0.202       -0.159    -4.444    0.000    -1.297    -0.501 
    social_hours_per_week    -0.043         0.016       -0.084    -2.730    0.007    -0.073    -0.012 
        occupationStudent     1.465         0.343        0.261     4.275    0.000     0.791     2.139 
  occupationSelf-employed     0.608         0.377        0.077     1.614    0.107    -0.133     1.348 
       occupationEmployed     0.672         0.322        0.135     2.085    0.038     0.038     1.306 
        occupationRetired    -0.083         0.504       -0.006    -0.165    0.869    -1.075     0.908 
exercise_minutes_per_week    -0.002         0.001       -0.054    -1.728    0.085    -0.004     0.000 
              sleep_hours    -0.197         0.117       -0.067    -1.684    0.093    -0.426     0.033 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
predictors = c(
  "productivity_0_100", 
  "sleep_quality_1_5", 
  "stress_level_0_10", 
  "work_mode", 
  "social_hours_per_week", 
  "occupation", 
  "exercise_minutes_per_week", 
  "sleep_hours"
  )

initial_model = lm(
  formula = reformulate(predictors, response = "screen_time_hours"), 
  data = st_data_without_st_overlap
)

summary(initial_model)

Call:
lm(formula = reformulate(predictors, response = "screen_time_hours"), 
    data = st_data_without_st_overlap)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-3.9407 -1.0134 -0.0375  1.0491  6.1067 

Coefficients:
                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)               11.185850   1.410794   7.929 2.39e-14 ***
productivity_0_100        -0.086531   0.011770  -7.352 1.18e-12 ***
sleep_quality_1_5          1.059653   0.170958   6.198 1.46e-09 ***
stress_level_0_10          0.320596   0.077540   4.135 4.36e-05 ***

occupationStudent          1.465294   0.342735   4.275 2.41e-05 ***

occupationEmployed         0.671893   0.322299   2.085  0.03775 *  
occupationRetired         -0.083266   0.504240  -0.165  0.86893    
exercise_minutes_per_week -0.001932   0.001118  -1.728  0.08482 .

Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 1.512 on 387 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.6427,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.6316 
F-statistic: 58.01 on 12 and 387 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
  1. Predicting Mental Wellness
wellness_model <- lm(mental_wellness_index_0_100 ~ exercise_minutes_per_week + 
                       screen_time_hours + sleep_quality_1_5,
                     data = cleaned_screen_time_data)

summary(wellness_model)

Call:
lm(formula = mental_wellness_index_0_100 ~ exercise_minutes_per_week + 
    screen_time_hours + sleep_quality_1_5, data = cleaned_screen_time_data)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-27.108  -6.280  -0.895   5.382  41.585 

Coefficients:
                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)               23.556233   2.657715   8.863  < 2e-16 ***
exercise_minutes_per_week  0.027016   0.007149   3.779 0.000182 ***
screen_time_hours         -3.668084   0.208216 -17.617  < 2e-16 ***
sleep_quality_1_5         19.254331   0.786881  24.469  < 2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 9.836 on 396 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.7688,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.767 
F-statistic: 438.8 on 3 and 396 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
# Mental Wellness from 1-100 = 23.56  - 3.67 (screen_time_hours) + 0.027 (exercise_minutes_per_week) + 19.25 (sleep_quality_1_5)
